member.name: T:Bozoros.Behaviours.ChangeSettings
member.summary: MonoBehaviour script for applying some config settings.

member.summary: List of ParticleSystems to adjust particle amounts for.

member.summary: List of ParticleSystems to adjust particle amounts for.

member.summary: List of all balloon stands on the map.

member.summary: The fire exit inside the Ferris Wheel.

member.name: M:Bozoros.Behaviours.ChangeSettings.ApplyVolume(System.Single,UnityEngine.AudioSource[])
member.summary: Apply volume amount to a given list of AudioSources.
member.param: A list of AudioSources to modify.

member.name: M:Bozoros.Behaviours.ChangeSettings.ApplyParticleIntensity(System.Single,UnityEngine.ParticleSystem[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Apply particle intensity to a given list of ParticleSystem instances.
member.param: The multiplier to apply to the given ParticleSystem.
The list of ParticleSystems to modify.
Whether or not the particles belong to fireworks (have one or more child ParticleSystem instances).

member.summary: Compatibility for Emergency Dice.

member.summary: Whether Emergency Dice is present in the BepInEx Chainloader or not.

member.summary: Whether EnemySkinRegistry is present in the BepInEx Chainloader or not.

member.summary: Compatibility for v0xx's LethalElements.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Config
member.summary: Class containing and defining plugin configuration options for Bozoros.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.STREAMER_FRIENDLY
member.summary: Whether the music is streamer-friendly or not.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.FIREWORK_PARTICLES
member.summary: Intensity of firework particles at the end of a clear day.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.CONFETTI_PARTICLES
member.summary: Intensity of confetti particles during eclipsed weather.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BALLOON_PARTICLES
member.summary: Intensity of balloon particles during stormy weather.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.FIREWORK_MUSIC_VOLUME
member.summary: Volume level for the firework music at the end of a clear day.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.FIREWORK_EXPLOSION_VOLUME
member.summary: Volume level for the firework explosion sound effects at the end of a clear day.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.ANNOUNCER_VOLUME
member.summary: Volume level for the announcer voice at the end of each day.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.TENT_MUSIC_VOLUME
member.summary: Volume level for the circus tent music near every entrance.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.DROPSHIP_VOLUME
member.summary: Volume level for the dropship's music when delivering items.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.GOOFY_PUFFER_NAMES
member.summary: A comma-separated list of names for Spore Lizard enemy variants to show in their scan node.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.CLOWN_GIANT_NAMES
member.summary: A comma-separated list of names for Forest Giant enemy variants to show in their scan node.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.SANTA_BUTLER_NAMES
member.summary: A comma-separated list of names for Santa Butler enemy variants to show in their scan node.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.EXTRA_PUFFER_SPAWNS
member.summary: Whether there should be additional Goofy Puffer spawns at the start of a round or not. Spore Lizards are capped at a maximum of 2 in vanilla.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.FOGGY_BARBER_SPAWNS
member.summary: Whether there should be additional outside Barber spawns during Foggy weather or not.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BALLOON_INSTRUCTIONS
member.summary: Show a one-time notification with instructions on how to operate balloons. Shows once per session, until the game is reopened.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BALLOON_PRICE
member.summary: Credits required to purchase a one-time balloon shortcut from one of the balloon stands around the map.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.FERRIS_WHEEL_EXIT
member.summary: Whether the Fire Exit inside the Ferris Wheel should spawn or not — wormholes may not be immersive!

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BANANA_MULTIPLIER_INSIDE
member.summary: Multiply inside banana peel hazard spawning curve across the board (minimum and maximum) by this value. Set to 0 to disable banana peels inside.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BANANA_MULTIPLIER_OUTSIDE
member.summary: Multiply outside banana peel hazard spawning curve across the board (minimum and maximum) by this value. Set to 0 to disable banana peels outside.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BANANA_DROPS_ITEMS
member.summary: Whether slipping on a banana peel causes all items to be dropped or not.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.MODIFY_SHIP_NODE
member.summary: Increase (subjective) accuracy of the ship's scan node.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.ADD_DROPSHIP_NODE
member.summary: Add a scan node to the dropship and allow it to be scanned.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.REDUCE_MOTION_SICKNESS
member.summary: Attempts to reduce motion sickness a bit. Currently only stops the camera turning when going through the twisted hallway.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.CIRCUS_FACILITY_MIMICS
member.summary: Allow x753's Mimics to spawn in Circus Facility.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.CIRCUS_PANDORAMUS_PORTAL
member.summary: Enable Circus Facility's special portal for DemonMae's Pandoramus; otherwise it'll just be the same as regular facility.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.CIRCUS_STARLANCERZERO_DOOR
member.summary: Enable Circus Facility swapping StarlancerZero's main entrance door.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BOZO_DICE_EFFECTS
member.summary: Enable Bozoros' custom effects for Emergency Dice.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.WESLEY_INTEGRATION
member.summary: Enable progression integration with Wesley's Moons.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.WESLEY_INJECT_SCRAPS
member.summary: Add a few Wesley-related scraps to Bozoros' spawn pool, if Wesley integration is active.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Config.BLACK_FOG_VOIDHEAD_SPAWNS
member.summary: Whether temporary Voidheads should spawn during Black Fog weather or not. Requires both Wesley's Interiors and DemonMae's Black Fog weather.

member.name: M:Bozoros.Config.#ctor(BepInEx.Configuration.ConfigFile)
member.summary: Constructor for initializing plugin configuration.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.BananaPeelDiceEffect
member.summary: Banana peel effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.BonkDeliveryDiceEffect
member.summary: Bonk Delivery effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.CircusInTownDiceEffect
member.summary: Circus in town effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.FishTouchDiceEffect
member.summary: Fish orbit effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.Outcome
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.ShowDefaultTooltip
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.Name
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.Tooltip
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: M:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.Use
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: M:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.OnNetworkSpawn
member.summary: Register dice effects every time this component is spawned.
member.remarks: This might be a bit cursed...

member.name: M:Bozoros.Effects.NetworkedDiceEffect.OnNetworkDespawn
member.summary: De-register dice effects upon being despawned.
member.remarks: This might be a bit cursed...

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.PufferInfestationDiceEffect
member.summary: Puffer infestation effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Effects.SantaVisitDiceEffect
member.summary: Santa Claus effect for Emergency Dice.

member.name: E:Bozoros.Patches.LoadPatch.OnFinishGeneratingLevelPost
member.summary: Event invoked after the moon finishes loading.

member.name: E:Bozoros.Patches.LoadPatch.OnFinishGeneratingNewLevelClientRpcPost
member.summary: Event invoked after the dungeon finishes generating.
member.remarks: NOTE: Runs twice for the host; use 'StartOfRound.StartNewRoundEvent' preferably, if possible.

member.name: T:Bozoros.Plugin
member.summary: Plugin for LethalMatt's Bozoros, adds configuration and some additional stuff.

member.name: F:Bozoros.Plugin.PLUGIN_GUID
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: F:Bozoros.Plugin.PLUGIN_NAME
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: F:Bozoros.Plugin.VERSION
member.summary: TODO.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Plugin.Harmony
member.summary: Harmony instance for patching.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Plugin.Settings
member.summary: Plugin configuration instance.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.ClownGiant.ClownGiantNames
member.summary: List of names that can be randomly assigned to Clown Giants.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.ClownGiant.Random
member.summary: Seeded Random instance intialized with the current map seed.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.GoofyPuffer.GoofyPufferNames
member.summary: List of names that can be randomly assigned to Goofy Puffers.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.GoofyPuffer.Random
member.summary: Seeded Random instance intialized with the current map seed.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.SantaButler.SantaButlerNames
member.summary: List of names that can be randomly assigned to Santa Butlers.

member.name: P:Bozoros.Skins.SantaButler.Random
member.summary: Seeded Random instance intialized with the current map seed.
